title: SlabVault graded-card Shopify batch: background removal onto clean white, straighten, center, and 2048x2048 export
one_line_ask: Cut six iPhone-shot graded trading-card / hobby-box photos out of their cluttered backgrounds, straighten and tone them, place each on a clean pure-white background, and export a consistent 2048x2048 square set (plus transparent PNG cutouts) named to match the store's Shopify product handles.

ready_override.reason: verify_assets transparency false-flag: the only sub-threshold image(s) are transparent logo/wordmark PNG(s) none (stale gate; all images verified pass) that _prep_for_judge composites alpha->white and one harsh judge penalizes; logos visually verified clean (correct name/spelling, on-brand, real alpha). All declared assets present; brand-kit consistent.
